testcase.name: test_school_has_required_programs

failure.message: AssertionError: School must have aulas_complementares (Recomposição) enabled assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf836d0c72b00>('aulas_complementares') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf836d0c72b00> = {'abastecimento_agua': None, 'aee': True, 'anexa_a': None, 'anos_letivos': {}, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_classes_aee_restructure.py:53: in test_school_has_required_programs assert school.get("aulas_complementares") == True, "School must have aulas_complementares (Recomposição) enabled" E AssertionError: School must have aulas_complementares (Recomposição) enabled E assert False == True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf836d0c72b00>('aulas_complementares') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf836d0c72b00> = {'abastecimento_agua': None, 'aee': True, 'anexa_a': None, 'anos_letivos': {}, ...}.get
